# 💡 C62 · Cross-Coalition Meta-Coalition Reading (RESERVED)
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Reserved slot from the v1.5.1 City Hall + AAIF patch anticipating a meta-coalition reading once a second kindred-coalition admission tests the relationship between coalitions in residence at /hall. Observation (status open) · no claim yet authored.
